positive: A highly detailed cyberpunk portrait of a samurai warrior standing in a neon-drenched Tokyo alleyway. Synthwave aesthetic, glowing holographic elements, heavy rain reflections, vibrant magenta and cyan color grading, cinematic lighting, digital painting, concept art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, soft focus, pastel colors, childish, cartoonish
